topics.label: Neo4j Setup
topics.description: Install Neo4j and use the Browser. Cypher queries graph data with ASCII art patterns.

topics.label: Nodes & Relationships
topics.description: (node)-[:REL]->(node) pattern syntax. Nodes have labels, relationships have types.

topics.label: MATCH & WHERE
topics.description: Find patterns in the graph and filter with WHERE. The core read operation.

topics.label: CREATE & MERGE
topics.description: Create new nodes and relationships. MERGE creates only if not exists.

topics.label: RETURN & Aggregation
topics.description: Return properties, count(), collect(), sum(), avg(). Shape query results.

topics.label: SET & DELETE
topics.description: Update properties with SET, remove nodes/relationships with DELETE/DETACH DELETE.

topics.label: Path Queries
topics.description: Variable-length paths [:REL*1..3], shortestPath. Traverse graph structures.

topics.label: Indexes & Constraints
topics.description: CREATE INDEX, CREATE CONSTRAINT for uniqueness. Performance optimization.
